coreStyles.title: GitHub · Change is constant. GitHub keeps you ahead. · GitHub

body.fontFamily: "Mona Sans VF", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", "Noto Sans", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji"

header.fontFamily: "Mona Sans VF", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", "Noto Sans", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji"

nav.fontFamily: "Mona Sans", MonaSansFallback, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji"

h1.fontFamily: "Mona Sans VF", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", "Noto Sans", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji"

h2.fontFamily: "Mona Sans VF", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", "Noto Sans", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji"

link.fontFamily: "Mona Sans VF", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", "Noto Sans", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji"

input.fontFamily: "Mona Sans VF", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", "Noto Sans", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji"

fontFaces: @font-face { font-family: "Noto Sans"; src: local("sans-serif"); unicode-range: U+60; }
@font-face { font-family: "Mona Sans"; src: url("./MonaSansVF-wdth-wght-opsz.woff2") format("woff2-variations"); font-weight: 200 900; font-display: swap; font-feature-settings: "liga" 0; }
@font-face { font-family: MonaSansFallback; size-adjust: 104.5%; ascent-override: 71%; src: local("Arial"); }
@font-face { font-family: MonaSansHeaderFallback; size-adjust: 103.1%; ascent-override: 70%; src: local("Arial Bold"); }
@font-face { font-family: "Hubot Sans"; src: url("./Hubot-Sans.woff2") format("woff2-variations"); font-weight: 200 900; font-display: swap; }
@font-face { font-family: "Mona Sans Mono"; src: url("./MonaSansMonoVF-wght.woff2") format("woff2-variations"); font-weight: 200 900; font-display: swap; }
